rationale: Healthcare and accessibility applications require warmth, trust, and clarity. A light theme with earthy, natural tones (bone white, warm sand, sage green) removes the 'sterile/clinical' feel while maintaining the high contrast needed for WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards.

typography.instructions: Banned fonts: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans. Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast. Never use generic 'bold' everywhere; use font-light for large H1s and font-medium for standard headings.

spacing_and_layout.scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32)
spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than default. Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

grid_modes.landing_page: BENTO GRID MODE A (Tetris Grid) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, gap-8 to gap-12, heavily asymmetrical.
grid_modes.studio_dashboard: CONTROL ROOM GRID MODE B - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure full height span usage (h-full) so widgets stretch.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and paragraphs. Center-align hero text only if visually balanced. Use optical alignment for icons/text.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F5F0]/80 with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). Ensures navigation remains readable over scrolling content.
surface_strategies.cards_and_widgets: Neumorphic/Clay hybrid: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-[#DCD5C9]), soft ambient shadow. Hover state: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, and explicitly change text color if background changes.
surface_strategies.studio_video_feed: Grid Borders: Enclose video panels in 1px solid borders. No rounded corners inside the grid (technical look) to maximize camera space.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary actions use solid Sage (#2E5A44). Quick-action manual sign phrase buttons use secondary or muted variants with explicit hover states.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS set explicit text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#2E5A44] hover:text-white). Focus states must have ring-2 ring-[#2E5A44].
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion. Wrap structural layout directly, do not break grid with framer-motion divs (motion.div must be the direct child or hold the specific class).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use explicit transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-out.

components.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Organic & Earthy palette. No default Vercel-look borders.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Chart components for the Snowflake-style analytics dashboard. Ensure palettes are color-blind friendly.
components.quick_action_phrases: Rendered as pill-shaped or masonry-grid buttons using secondary colors.
components.video_studio: Dual-pane layout. The Hearing speaker and Deaf signer panes must be visually balanced, side-by-side on desktop, stacked on mobile.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all interface icons. Use stroke-width 1.5 for a modern, clean look.

media.instructions: Use exact provided URLs. NEVER use placeholders.

hero_background.description: Doctor consults with a patient. Use in the landing page hero section or about section to build trust.

sign_language_demo.description: A woman making sign language gestures in a close-up shot indoors. Ideal for the 'How it Works' section or Studio preview.

sign_language_poster.description: Hands forming American Sign Language alphabet. Use for educational sections or the phrase catalog background.

healthcare_consultation.description: Healthcare professional consulting a patient. Perfect for showing real-world impact in the landing page.

asl_demonstration.description: Person demonstrating ASL in a black jacket. Use for feature section on 'Real-time translation'.

accessibility_requirements.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
accessibility_requirements.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, video toggles, phrase buttons) MUST have 'data-testid' attributes using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='toggle-camera-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Organic & Earthy palette. No generic SaaS blue or mint.
Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body text.
Implement the Dual-pane real-time communication studio using the 'Control Room' grid layout.
Apply the 'data-testid' attribute to every actionable element for robust automated testing.
Construct the analytics dashboard with clear, accessible charts that rely on data shapes, not just color.
Ensure the hero layout is asymmetrical. DO NOT center-align everything by default.
